title: Module Check: Dynamic Programming — The Three-Stage Pipeline

questions.question: What are the two conditions both required for dynamic programming to apply?
What decorator converts a Python recursive function to memoised DP with one line?
In 0/1 Knapsack 1D DP, why must the capacity loop iterate in reverse order?
questions.answer: To prevent using the current item more than once — forward iteration would use updated values from the same item, effectively allowing unlimited use

questions.question: What is the main advantage of top-down memoisation over bottom-up tabulation?
questions.answer: Top-down only computes subproblems that are actually needed (lazy evaluation) — efficient for sparse subproblem graphs

questions.question: Name one interview problem that requires a 2D DP state because a 1D state is insufficient.
questions.answer: Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown (state = day × holding status), or any problem with two independent decisions per step
